summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) for the line-119 true branch to fire.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must hold the exact value 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE). The blocker line 119 compares png_ptr->color_type, derived directly from that IHDR byte, against the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant; only color_type==3 takes the true side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 cmplog winning seeds carry 03 at offset 0x19 (the byte-diff shows 03(.)x10 for W with no other values), so png_handle_IHDR records color_type=PALETTE and line 119 evaluates true (W branch fires T=10 F=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The naive loser seeds hold 00 or 04 at offset 0x19 (byte-diff shows L 00(.)x8 04(.)x2), neither of which is PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE, so line 119 is always false for the loser (L branch fires T=0 F=10) and it stays blocked all 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace intercepts the integer CMP at line 119 (color_type vs PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE constant 3), logs the constant operand into the CmpLogObserver buffer, then substitutes that value into the matching input byte at offset 0x19; naive has no CMP introspection and must land color_type==3 by blind havoc, which it never does in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a comparison of png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE at pngread.c:119.
All winner seeds hold byte 0x03 at offset 0x19 while losers hold 0x00 or 0x04.
The winner takes the true side of line 119 in all 10 trials while the loser never does.
cmplog resolves the branch in all 10 trials and naive in none, with the loser blocked the full 24h.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for an operand match and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator and only blind havoc/token mutations.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3883 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed <ID>` for two winning seeds. Seed 14ddd5a497528d88 shows an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 (ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9); seed 414b4a1157e93507 shows the same dash-row ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9 at depth 21. Both winning chains descend from an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build, confirming I2S contribution (lower bound).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==3 where naive resolves the branch as readily as cmplog (no I2S advantage), i.e. cmplog does not significantly out-resolve naive at the color_type==PALETTE gate.

weakest_evidence_point: The mode & PNG_HAVE_PLTE == 0 second conjunct on line 120 is also required for the chunk-error path, but the byte controlling PLTE-absence is not isolated in the byte diff, so the single-feature claim assumes color_type is the sole limiting factor.
